quality_signals.piotroski_note: Canonical Piotroski F-Score not computable from current yf MCP get_financials surface (missing total_assets, current_assets/liabilities, long-term debt split, gross_profit, operating_cash_flow, historical share counts). See ABA-70.

magic_formula.roic_note: ROIC not computable from current yf MCP surface (canonical denominator requires total_assets, current_assets/liabilities, intangibles). See ABA-70.

screen.rationale: Quality ratio 7/9 = 78% (above 75% PASS cutoff) but Magic Formula WATCH (EY 2.43%, rank 4 of 5; ROIC N/A — MCP-constrained per ABA-70) caps verdict at WATCH; op-margin compressed YoY (60.4% vs 62.4%) and total debt edged up, but FCF doubled (60.9B→96.7B) and SBC intensity dropped.

signal.qualitative_note: TAM ceiling risk: NVDA data centre revenue ~$190B vs ~$250B DC GPU TAM; ~76% penetration implies ceiling risk at current growth trajectory.
signal._merge_source: preserved from reports/NVDA_20260512.json — stages.signal not re-run on 2026-05-13

timing.sue_caveat: 4-quarter std-dev is statistically weaker than the 8-quarter window used in the academic literature; treat SUE > 1.5 as the noise floor for v1.
timing.rationale: SUE 4.37 well above the 1.5 v1 noise floor on the FY2026-Q4 print, but PEAD window already expired (day 102 of 60 — drift has run its course).
